title: merrillia caloxylon
intro: Merrillia caloxylon, also known as the Caloxylon tree, is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Malaysia and Thailand, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Merrillia caloxylon can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments.
